c.d: The total number of movies, TV shows, and other media available on the platform.
The monthly fee required to access the platform's content.
The ease of navigation and overall user experience of the app.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, tablets, smart TVs) that support the app.
The presence and quantity of exclusive, original programming on the platform.
The maximum resolution and audio quality offered by the platform (e.g., 4K, Dolby Atmos).
Availability of free or lower-cost tiers that include advertisements.
The ability to download content for offline viewing.
Access to live television channels or events through the platform.
The number of active users or subscribers on the platform.
